name: deep-crawl
description: Recursively crawl a website using headless Chrome (CDP). Renders JavaScript, follows same-origin links via BFS, extracts text from each page, and saves results to disk.
author: hagency

tools.name: deep_crawl
tools.description: Recursively crawl a website using a headless browser (CDP). Renders JavaScript, follows same-origin links via BFS, extracts text from each page, and saves results to disk. Ideal for JS-rendered SPAs and documentation sites.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (range: 1-200, default: 50)

path_prefix.description: Only follow links under this path prefix (e.g. /docs/)
